degraded.detail: classify_complexity flagged touches_auth + touches_rls from the words 'authoritative'/'URL' in the description; the diff touches no **/auth/**, src/lib/supabase/, or RLS files. Overridden; F11 recomputes risk flags from the diff. The real diff-derived flag is touches_io_boundary (handled: Boundary Probe + round-trip).

behaviors.behavior: AC1: a canonical .shipwright/ layout (root shipwright_events.jsonl + traceability-matrix.md) routes + grades authoritatively
AC1: staleness fires when the newest work_completed commit != HEAD; commit-less (worktree-model) logs are never false-flagged; large-log tail read
AC1: corrupt/partial/mixed/empty/exception .shipwright/ falls back to labelled heuristic
AC1: a grader-grade of a real Shipwright repo equals its dashboard grade (authoritative == dashboard)
behaviors.evidence: live probe: grade.py on the worktree -> mode=authoritative, A 99.9, verified_from shipwright_events.jsonl (249 events)

behaviors.behavior: AC2: URL scheme allowlist accepts https/git@/ssh/owner-repo and rejects http/git/file/ext/traversal/leading-dash-host
behaviors.evidence: test_clone.py::TestNormalizeUrl (accept + reject incl. CVE-2017-1000117 dash hosts)

behaviors.behavior: AC2: real shallow clone + post-clone size cap + tempdir purged even when the clone crashes mid-flight
behaviors.evidence: test_clone.py::{TestRealClone,TestOpenTarget::test_tempdir_purged_even_when_clone_crashes}; live probe: real clone of octocat/Hello-World

behaviors.behavior: AC3: grade.py <url> clones and grades; --no-clone rejects a URL cleanly (exit 2) with no network
AC3/AC4: the standalone CLI is non-interactive and never reads stdin
AC4: interactive mode asks <=2 provenance-stamped enrichment questions that never change the base deterministic grade unless a documented override is chosen
behaviors.evidence: SKILL.md 'Interactive vs standalone' — a runtime protocol of the Claude Code session, not a CLI code path; the standalone determinism half IS tested (above)

behaviors.behavior: AC5/AC6: the shipwright-grade plugin is registered (marketplace/install/README/CLAUDE/update-marketplace) with version parity
AC7: ruff clean; all changed modules <=300 LOC
behaviors.evidence: uvx ruff@0.15.15 check . -> All checks passed; wc -l max 237 (routing.py)

behaviors.behavior: Hardening: a private/404/auth-required URL clone fails fast (non-interactive git), never hanging on a credential prompt
behaviors.evidence: test_clone.py::TestNonInteractive; live probe: auth-required clone fails in ~1s (not the 60s timeout)

behaviors.behavior: Hardening: an oversize target event log (>10MB) is refused by the authoritative path (hostile-clone OOM guard) -> heuristic fallback
Hardening: a symlinked .shipwright event log/RTM escaping the repo root is ignored (untrusted-clone guard)
